overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a drive through Los Santos suburbs during golden hour. The player drives a yellow vehicle from a wide downtown boulevard through winding hillside residential streets, passing historic architecture, luxury homes, and blooming jacaranda trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide suburban boulevard with downtown skyline view

events.description: turning right at intersection with grassy median and traffic bollards
entering residential area with park landscape visible on right

agents.ego_description: driving along wide boulevard following traffic, then turning right at an intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane

single-family homes with front yards and driveways
landscaped median with grass and orange traffic bollards at intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide multi-lane suburban boulevard during golden hour, with the downtown skyline visible in the distance. The camera vehicle drives forward past palm-lined streets, then turns right at an intersection with a grassy median, entering a more residential area with parkland visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with historic brick architecture

events.description: large historic brick building with arched windows comes into view on the left
beginning ascent on winding uphill road with rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating through residential streets, passing a large brick building and beginning to climb the hillside

entered.detail: large gothic-style brick building with arched windows and decorative stonework
tall stone retaining wall with manicured hedges on top
steep rocky terrain with sparse vegetation beginning to rise

segments.scene_description: Driving through a residential district, a prominent historic brick building appears on the left while the road begins to wind uphill. The downtown skyline fades from view as the vehicle enters a more enclosed neighborhood with stone walls and parked cars, transitioning toward the hillside terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside road with luxury homes

events.description: white sports car crosses at intersection ahead
yellow taco truck passes by on the left, temporarily blocking view
tall modern apartment tower becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: driving uphill on winding road through hillside residential area, navigating curves

notable_agents.action: white sports car waiting at intersection then driving across the road

entered.detail: yellow and white food truck with text on the side parked on the left
tall modernist high-rise building with multiple balconies
large modern homes with landscaped gardens and driveways

segments.scene_description: The vehicle climbs a winding hillside road flanked by rocky terrain on the left and luxury villas on the right. A white sports car crosses at an intersection, followed by passing a colorful taco truck. A tall modern apartment tower emerges in the distance as the road continues to ascend through the dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with blooming jacaranda trees

events.description: street becomes lined with blooming purple jacaranda trees on both sides
approaching and stopping at stop sign painted on the road surface

agents.ego_description: driving through residential neighborhood with blooming trees, stopping at stop sign behind traffic

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead and stopping at the stop sign

entered.detail: trees with vibrant purple blossoms lining both sides of the street
red octagonal stop sign at residential intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a residential street adorned with blooming jacaranda trees displaying purple flowers. The vehicle continues past parked cars and suburban homes, approaching an intersection where it stops at a stop sign. The tall apartment tower remains visible in the distance to the right as the drive continues through the peaceful neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a wide suburban boulevard into the winding, elevated residential streets of a hillside neighborhood during golden hour. It begins on a multi-lane road with the downtown skyline visible in the distance, moving past palm trees before turning right at a grassy median into a quieter residential area. As the vehicle winds uphill, the skyline fades from view and the open road transitions into an enclosed district characterized by historic brick buildings and stone walls. The scene then shifts to a steeper ascent through rocky terrain and luxury villas, passing a white sports car and a colorful taco truck as a modern apartment tower emerges on the horizon. Finally, the road levels out into a peaceful neighborhood adorned with blooming purple jacaranda trees, where the vehicle slows to a stop at a sign with the distant tower still visible to the right.
